steps.title: Create src/cisterna/adapters/base.py
steps.description: AdapterBase ABC with emit_start/emit_end/emit_error methods, ALLOWED_NAMES guard, and _swallow_name_error. Implement BathosAdapter and ContemplexAdapter per spec §3.6, §5.4.

steps.title: Create src/cisterna/adapters/v3_middleware.py
steps.description: CisternaMiddleware(Middleware) for FastMCP v3 per spec §3.7. Async on_call_tool handler with token management and error handling.

steps.title: Create src/cisterna/adapters/v2_decorator.py
steps.description: traced_tool double-decorator per spec §3.8. Wrapper for sync FastMCP v2 tools.

steps.title: Create src/cisterna/probe/capability_probe.py
steps.description: Per-consumer surface selection per spec §5.2. _has_v3_middleware() check and CONSUMER_SURFACE table.

steps.title: Create tests/test_mcp.py
steps.description: AC-MCP test coverage: v3 middleware, v2 decorator, error handling, token management per §8.

steps.title: Create tests/test_namefreeze.py
steps.description: AC-NAMEFREEZE test coverage: AST lint + runtime guards per spec §4.3-4.4.

steps.title: Run full test suite and linter
steps.description: Verify uv run pytest (all) green and uv run ruff check . clean.

steps.title: Commit work atomically
steps.description: git add -A && git commit with descriptive message.

steps.notes: tool() supports bare and parameterised forms; returns fn unchanged
eager imports of tool + clear_registry; lazy wire via __getattr__
added tool + clear_registry to public API and __all__

title: M2-COMPOSE (2141): shim.py + compose.py implementation
summary: Implemented shim.dispatch (E1), is_async, cli_dispatch (TBD-M2-3), compose_mcp_callable (E2/H1/C5), exported from registration.__init__. 27 new tests covering AC-M2-2/3/4/5/6. 107/107 pass, ruff clean.
